stages.name: reduce_mean
stages.description: Compute row-wise mean via SUM reduce with 1/W scaler, broadcast to full shape

stages.name: subtract_mean
stages.description: Subtract row-wise mean from input via COL broadcast subtraction

stages.name: variance
stages.description: Compute variance: square centered values and reduce with 1/W scaler, broadcast to full shape
stages.reference_body: x = input_tensor.to(torch.float32); c = x - x.mean(-1, True); return (c**2).mean(-1, True).expand_as(x).to(torch.bfloat16)

stages.name: normalize
stages.description: Full normalization without affine: rsqrt(var+eps) * centered

stages.name: affine
stages.description: Full layer_norm with affine transform: gamma * normalized + beta
